Two repos (this is easy to mix up):

  kaarusan/myeo       — main development (your Cursor workspace remote is usually this).
  kaarusan/myeo-site  — "Public deploy repo"; Vercel / CI for myeo.io often watches THIS one.

If the live site looks stale, push dev to deploy:

  git remote add myeo-site https://github.com/kaarusan/myeo-site.git
  git push myeo-site main:main

Or point Vercel's Git integration at kaarusan/myeo only and archive myeo-site.
